product: Sankey visualization and table formatting improvements
tagline: Display name support for Sankey visualizations: Sankey charts now support display names for nodes.
what_it_does: Display name support for Sankey visualizations: Sankey charts now support display names for nodes. Fixed duplicate $ signs in table formatting: Resolved an issue where table visualizations sometimes displayed duplicate dollar signs.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Display name support for Sankey visualizations: Sankey charts now support display names for nodes. Fixed duplicate $ signs in table formatting: Resolved an issue where table visualizations sometimes displayed duplicate dollar signs.
key_takeaway: Display name support for Sankey visualizations: Sankey charts now support display names for nodes.
